title: SAIT, Study Abroad Information for Taiwanese Students
points: Built a similarity-based admission analysis tool to recommend relevant study abroad cases using weighted embedding.

title: GUI-ASFormer, Detecting Keyframes in Graphical User Interface Videos
points: Improved ASFormer for GUI action segmentation with a two stream encoder, high-resolution embeddings, frame differencing, and multiscale temporal convolutions, boosting F1@50 by +7.1 and edit distance by +6.8

title: Job Postings Searching System
points: Implemented a system that used user profiles as queries to match relevant job postings, applying NLP techniques such as text classification, semantic similarity, and ranking models to achieve a 67% improvement in NDCG over baseline.
